images.title: The End Of Our World (261033559).jpeg
images.description: 500px provided description: I find the pictures too perfect of this type without any other interest than purely decorative. Nevertheless, the psychorigides critical of photgraphic art adore this perfect respect of the rule of thirds, this perfect composition and these perfect colors. As I like to please everyone, I also take photos to cheer these essential psychorigides critical photographic art. However, I did not put the original photo in the direction of reading, from left to right, that cherish the critical psychorigides of photographic art. I will probably not make them happy finally [#red ,#sea ,#beauty ,#water ,#blue ,#lighthouse ,#rock ,#shore ,#seascape ,#simplicity ,#seashore ,#melancholy ,#sea shore ,#purified]
